claim: Gemini Nano is a 3-4GB on-device model shared across all apps via the AI Core system service, avoiding per-app bloat
actionable: For on-device inference on Android, use AI Core to access Gemini Nano rather than bundling the model per app

claim: Foreground apps get priority access to the shared Gemini Nano model; background batch jobs queue and run overnight on charge
actionable: Use AI Core's background queuing for batch processing tasks and reserve foreground prompts for latency-sensitive user-facing features

claim: Hybrid inference (fallback from on-device Nano to Gemini Flash in cloud) increases reach across older devices when on-device is unavailable
actionable: Implement hybrid inference with Firebase AI Logic to gracefully degrade from local Gemini Nano to cloud Gemini Flash for devices without Nano support

claim: Gemini Nano (GenAI MLKit APIs) requires flagship devices from the last couple of years; classic MLKit vision and OCR run on billions of devices
actionable: Use classic MLKit for vision/OCR when broad device compatibility is required; reserve GenAI APIs for flagship-device-only apps

claim: The ML Kit Prompt API supports text and image input with text-only output, enabling image understanding and content analysis on-device
actionable: Use ML Kit Prompt API for on-device multimodal tasks like image understanding and entity extraction without cloud calls
